title: Resolution Encouraging All Lessors and Owners of Commercial Establishments and Landlords Within the Municipality of Los Baños to Have a Moratorium on Rental Fees in View of the Enhanced Community Quarantine Due to the Corona Virus Disease 2019 (COVID-19). (AUTHOR(S): Councilor(s) Miko C. Pelegrina, Janos S. Lapiz, Geronimo A. Ciceron, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Cris Dayril B. Bagnes, and Jozylyn N. Manansala, 03/23/2020)
